prompt: Revue systématique sur l'efficacité des probiotiques dans la prévention des infections récurrentes à Clostridioides difficile.
assertions: The orchestrator uses PICO/PICOS framework (this is an intervention question)
The protocol includes Population (patients with recurrent C. difficile infection), Intervention (probiotics), Comparison (placebo/standard care), and Outcome
The review type is correctly identified as systematic review
At least 3 databases are listed in the search strategy
Search concepts include synonyms/MeSH terms for probiotics AND C. difficile
Inclusion and exclusion criteria are explicitly stated
The protocol is persisted to review/protocol.md via the Write tool
